text: Live Updates: U.S. fighter jet downed over Iran, 1 crew member rescued by American forces - CBS News
fullText: Iran shot down a U.S. fighter jet and one crew member was rescued by American forces as a search continues for a 2nd crew member, U.S. officials say.

text: March jobs report blows past expectations - washingtonpost.com
fullText: The March jobs report marks the first major release of economic data reflecting the period after the start of the Iran war, which has weighed on households and businesses.

text: Live updates at the 2026 Women's Final Four in Phoenix - NCAA.com
fullText: Follow along as we provide on-site coverage at the 2026 Women's Final Four from Phoenix as we crown a national champion for March Madness.

text: Fire make Bridget Carleton top WNBA expansion draft pick - ESPN
fullText: Unrestricted free agent Bridget Carleton was selected by the Portland Fire as the No. 1 pick in the 2026 WNBA expansion draft Friday.

text: Brian Cox Drags Tarantino, Says Jeremy Strong Has ‘Begged Me to Stop’ Discussing His Method Acting and Disses America for Not Liking Women: ‘The Patriarchy Is a F—ing Mess’ - Variety
fullText: Brian Cox takes aim at Quentin Tarantino, Ian McKellen, Edward Norton in a new interview and says Jeremy Strong wants him to stop talking about him.

text: Iran downs a U.S. F-15 jet and hits Gulf refineries as the war rounds its 5th week - NPR
fullText: Iran said one of the longest bridges linking Tehran to the city of Karaj was destroyed overnight, while Iranian missiles and drones hit Israel, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates and Kuwait.

text: Five-round 2026 NFL mock draft: Giants, Jets among seven teams to take CB in Round 4 - NFL.com
fullText: In his third mock of the 2026 NFL Draft -- a five-rounder! -- Chad Reuter sees a run on corners occurring in Round 4, with the Giants and Jets among the seven teams to take a CB off the board.

text: Artemis II Astronaut Christina Koch Proclaims Herself 'Space Plumber' - OutKick
fullText: Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch fixes a malfunctioning Orion capsule toilet mid-mission, earning “space plumber" status and saving the crew from a worst-case scenario in orbit.

fullText: Fitbit is rolling out version 4.66 of the Android app with all the new Public Preview features announced earlier this week.

text: White House again proposes steep NASA budget cuts - SpaceNews
fullText: For the second consecutive year, the White House is proposing a major budget cut for NASA that would significantly impact science and the ISS.
